# BreakBPM

> BreakBPM is a free, browser-based billiards score tracker that calculates per-player Balls Per Minute (BPM) for 8-ball, 9-ball, practice, and solo Shark mode. No install required.

BreakBPM logs every shot one ball at a time and returns two numbers: accuracy and BPM. It supports live multiplayer scoring via a 5-character share code, spectating by player name, and optional pass-gated features such as full game history, tiered stats, a global leaderboard, and @mention linking. Passes are purchased on-chain with cryptocurrency — buy any 1 to 365 days of access at a per-day rate that drops the more days you add (from $1.99), or buy a Lifetime pass — or unlocked with a redeem code; there is no on-platform card checkout or subscription. A 14 Day Pass ($5.99) is also available by card via an off-platform store, delivered as an emailed redeem code. New players can claim one free pass per account (a guaranteed win, while monthly stock lasts).

Built and operated by Saym Services Inc. in Vancouver, Canada.

## Key pages

- Home: https://breakbpm.com/
- About (overview + free pass): https://breakbpm.com/pool-stats-app
- Passes & Pricing: https://breakbpm.com/passes
- Manual (how it works): https://breakbpm.com/about
- Legal: https://breakbpm.com/legal
